examples: He came from the twenty-third floor down to the lobby on the mezzanine to collect his mail before breakfast, and he believed—he hoped—that he looked passably well: doing all right.
She has always been quick to pick things up, doing passably well in school without really trying.
He described the film as "passably entertaining" but said it failed to "break any stylistic ground".
Crisply put together but just passably amusing, the movie is innocuous, light, and -- obviously -- very, very slight.
